---
name: supplier-management
description: "Use when managing supplier relationships end-to-end: discovery, outreach, negotiation, quality control, and ongoing re-ordering. Covers multi-supplier strategies, MOQ optimization, and landed cost reduction."
---
# Supplier Management Skill

## Purpose
Automate and optimize the full supplier lifecycle from discovery through ongoing relationship management.

## Capabilities

### 1. Supplier Discovery
- Search Made-in-China.com, Alibaba, 1688 for matching suppliers
- Search domestic sources: ThomasNet, Wholesale Central, local distributors, trade show directories
- Score suppliers on: years in business, trade assurance, response rate, verified status
- Build comparison matrices with landed cost estimates
- Identify dropship-capable suppliers (no inventory risk)
- Consider domestic suppliers for: faster lead times, lower MOQ, no duties/customs, simpler logistics

### 2. Outreach Automation
- Generate personalized initial inquiry emails
- Include product specs, target pricing, MOQ requirements
- Attach professional templates with company background
- Track outreach status per supplier

### 3. Negotiation Playbook
- Round 1: Anchoring — request 30% below target to create room
- Round 2: Concessions — offer larger MOQ or faster payment for price breaks
- Round 3: Comparison leverage — share competing quotes (sanitized)
- Round 4: Final offer — walk-away price with deadline
- Always maintain relationship — don't burn bridges

### 4. Quality Control
- Request samples before first bulk order
- Define inspection criteria checklist
- Set up third-party inspection (SGS, Bureau Veritas) for orders >$500
- Track defect rates per supplier

### 5. Reorder Optimization
- Monitor inventory levels vs lead time
- Calculate reorder points with safety stock
- Negotiate volume discounts on repeat orders
- Diversify suppliers to reduce single-source risk

## Decision Rules
- Never commit >30% of budget to a single supplier on first order
- Require samples before any order >$200
- Landed cost must meet ≥35% gross margin target
- Lead time variance >5 days triggers supplier risk flag
- Always get 3+ quotes before selecting

## Output Formats
- Supplier comparison matrix (CSV)
- Outreach email drafts (Markdown)
- Negotiation counter-offer (JSON)
- Quality inspection checklist (Markdown)
